homepage.title: Japan Airport Transfer & Charter Services | Tokyo / Osaka / Mount Fuji | Licensed Vehicles
homepage.selling_point: Licensed green plate vehicles, full insurance. On-time pickup, luggage assistance, peace of mind throughout.

services.private_charter: Custom Charter (Mount Fuji, Kyoto, Nara, Hokkaido)

range.tokyo: Tokyo: Narita ↔ City Center, Haneda ↔ City Center, Tokyo City, Yokohama, Hakone, Mount Fuji
range.osaka: Osaka: Kansai ↔ Osaka / Kyoto / Nara, Kobe
range.others: Others: Hokkaido (New Chitose ↔ Sapporo), Fukuoka, etc.

advantages: Flight delay waiting service, free luggage handling

alphard.title: Toyota Alphard
alphard.suitable_for: 2–6 people, families / business, lots of luggage
alphard.features: Luxury interior, electric doors, independent air conditioning, quiet and comfortable

hiace.title: Toyota Hiace
hiace.suitable_for: 7–8 people, small groups, skiing / golf with large luggage
hiace.features: High roof, super large luggage compartment, spacious

charter.alphard: Approx. 60,000 JPY and up (10 hours, including driver + fuel)
charter.hiace: Approx. 80,000 JPY and up (10 hours, including driver + fuel)

steps: Provide: Date, flight number, number of people, number of luggage, destination

questions.question: What services do you offer?
questions.answer: We offer airport transfers, private charters, and sightseeing tours.

questions.question: How can I book a service?
questions.answer: You can contact us via WhatsApp to book a service.
